persona.name: Carlos Ramirez
persona.role_summary: Backend Engineer — API design, database integration, backend performance optimization, and security implementation.

allocation_rationale: Carlos is a full-service backend engineer. The API, security, and database skill groups map directly to his four capabilities. Language skills (Java, Python, JS/TS, Go, FastAPI, Django) cover his implementation stack. Performance, testing, and documentation round out production-quality delivery.

skills.name: backend-architect
skills.description: Design scalable backend systems with microservices, event-driven architecture, and modern cloud patterns. Masters distributed systems and database optimization. Use PROACTIVELY for backend system design.

skills.name: backend-security-coder
skills.description: Write secure backend code with authentication, authorization, and data protection built-in. Prevents injection, SSRF, and privilege escalation. Use PROACTIVELY for security-critical backend code.

skills.name: api-documenter
skills.description: Create comprehensive API documentation with OpenAPI/Swagger specs and interactive examples. Masters REST and GraphQL documentation standards. Use PROACTIVELY for API documentation tasks.

skills.name: graphql-architect
skills.description: Design efficient GraphQL APIs with schema design, resolvers, and performance optimization. Masters federation and real-time subscriptions. Use PROACTIVELY for GraphQL architecture.

skills.name: java-pro
skills.description: Write enterprise Java with Spring Boot, modern JDK features, and reactive programming. Masters JVM optimization and microservices. Use PROACTIVELY for Java development.

skills.name: python-pro
skills.description: Write Pythonic code with modern patterns, type hints, and performance optimization. Masters async programming and popular frameworks. Use PROACTIVELY for Python development.

skills.name: javascript-pro
skills.description: Master modern JavaScript with ES2024+ features, async patterns, and runtime optimization. Handles Node.js, Deno, and browser environments. Use PROACTIVELY for JavaScript development.

skills.name: typescript-pro
skills.description: Master TypeScript with advanced types, generics, and strict type safety. Use PROACTIVELY for TypeScript architecture, type inference optimization, or advanced typing patterns.

skills.name: golang-pro
skills.description: Write idiomatic Go code with proper error handling, concurrency patterns, and performance optimization. Masters Go modules and testing. Use PROACTIVELY for Go development.

skills.name: fastapi-pro
skills.description: Build high-performance FastAPI applications with async patterns, type safety, and automatic OpenAPI docs. Masters Pydantic and dependency injection. Use PROACTIVELY for FastAPI development.

skills.name: django-pro
skills.description: Build production Django applications with optimal ORM usage, security, and performance. Masters Django REST Framework and deployment best practices. Use PROACTIVELY for Django development.

skills.name: sql-pro
skills.description: Master modern SQL with cloud-native databases, OLTP/OLAP optimization, and advanced query techniques. Use PROACTIVELY for database optimization or complex analysis.

skills.name: database-admin
skills.description: Manage database systems with backup, recovery, replication, and security. Handles performance tuning and capacity planning. Use PROACTIVELY for database administration.

skills.name: database-optimizer
skills.description: Optimize database performance with query tuning, indexing strategies, and execution plan analysis. Masters multiple database engines. Use PROACTIVELY for database optimization.

skills.name: performance-engineer
skills.description: Optimize application performance with profiling, benchmarking, and capacity planning. Masters load testing and bottleneck analysis. Use PROACTIVELY for performance optimization.

skills.name: code-reviewer
skills.description: Provide thorough code reviews focusing on maintainability, security, and performance. Identifies bugs, suggests improvements, and enforces coding standards. Use PROACTIVELY for code reviews.

skills.name: debugger
skills.description: Systematically diagnose and fix bugs using debugging tools, logging, and root cause analysis. Handles memory leaks, race conditions, and edge cases. Use PROACTIVELY for debugging sessions.

skills.name: error-detective
skills.description: Analyze error logs, stack traces, and crash reports to identify root causes. Masters log aggregation tools and error tracking systems. Use PROACTIVELY for error investigation.

skills.name: tdd-orchestrator
skills.description: Master TDD orchestrator specializing in red-green-refactor discipline, multi-agent workflow coordination, and comprehensive test-driven development practices. Use PROACTIVELY for TDD implementation and governance.

skills.name: test-automator
skills.description: Master AI-powered test automation with modern frameworks, self-healing tests, and comprehensive quality engineering. Use PROACTIVELY for testing automation or quality assurance.

skills.name: reference-builder
skills.description: Create comprehensive API references and technical documentation with consistent formatting and examples. Masters documentation automation. Use PROACTIVELY for reference documentation.
